title: One Last Kiss Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video
display_title: One Last Kiss Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video
wikitext:
[]: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Mar 07, 2021 10:10 pm At midnight on March 9 there will be a release of Utada Hikaru's "One Last Kiss". It will be accompanied with a Hideaki Anno produced music video. Whether this is a live action or footage from the film is a mystery. Guess we'll find out in 11 hours at this Youtube Location: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0Uhh62MUEic Official Website: https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/shin_themesong/ Hikaru Utada "One Last Kiss" A music video by Hideaki Anno will be premiered on 3/9 (Tuesday) 0:00 YouTube! The music video for "One Last Kiss" will be premiered on YouTube today at 24:00 (Tuesday, March 9th, 0:00). This music video is produced by Hideaki Anno, who works on the "Evangelion" series!

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Mar 07, 2021 10:23 pm i waited 8 months for the whole song, i guess i can wait another day.......

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Mar 07, 2021 10:41 pm bladerj wrote: i waited 8 months for the whole song, i guess i can wait another day.......

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by cyharding » Mon Mar 08, 2021 12:04 am An article on the front page has been posted.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Mon Mar 08, 2021 3:19 am Anno directed the video too, actually! Edit: For proof, here is a part of the music video's description: ■今ミュージックビデオに関して 今ミュージックビデオは、『シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版』総監督の庵野秀明が監督を務めました。 宇多田ヒカルサイドからのミュージックビデオ製作オファーを快諾した庵野氏は 「現状可能なMVの作り方として現場ディレクション無しで本人の自撮り等による撮影素材を送ってもらって、それを切り取り繋げて作品に仕上げる」という方法を提案。庵野氏からカメラ目線やリップシンク等メールによる最小限の注文を受け、宇多田ヒカルは細心のコロナ感染対策を取りながら数名のスタッフとともにロンドン郊外で撮影を敢行。 スマートフォンも含む様々な機材で撮られた映像素材を受け取った庵野監督らが日本で編集を行いました。まるでプライベートな過去の大切な記憶を辿るような、切ない感情が湧き上がる作品が完成しましたので、是非お楽しみください。

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Icosahedron » Mon Mar 08, 2021 7:18 am Looks like the song leaked early on youtube/the subreddit. Safe to say the rest of it is as good as what we've heard!

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Mar 08, 2021 7:30 am Indeed. It’s a banger. OH LORDY it’s a banger. You thought that first minute was good? Holy cow you ain’t heard nothing yet. If I’d have had that playing on a cinema sound system with credits rolling I would have been a complete mess.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:08 am Very Anno-esque opening, but where was it filmed? -- the locations looked European, which would be surprising in the current circumstances.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by xenosaga » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:10 am Mr. Tines wrote: Very Anno-esque opening, but where was it filmed? -- the locations looked European, which would be surprising in the current circumstances.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:13 am My body was not ready for the video. That lady has a smile that could end wars.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by xenosaga » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:15 am International LP release confirmed cover art for International LP https://www.utadahikaru.jp/news/detail.html?id=527477

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:23 am xenosaga wrote: Mr. Tines#913418 wrote: Very Anno-esque opening, but where was it filmed? -- the locations looked European, which would be surprising in the current circumstances.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:46 am You gotta remember that the U.K. is as exotic to Japanese as their country is to us. It easy as a British person to think of us as the default, the vanilla to everyone else’s unusual flavours but it’s not the case. Also that LP cover though. Imma buying that.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Mar 08, 2021 11:04 am Those basses are KILLER and Anno's cinematography is a cleansing bath of nostalgia and bittersweet feelings. Jayfive wrote: My body was not ready for the video. That lady has a smile that could end wars.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Kid » Mon Mar 08, 2021 11:42 am Oof, that last minute and a half makes me sad Eva is over. It feels like the ending of a magical, youthful summer

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Sharpe » Mon Mar 08, 2021 11:44 am xenosaga wrote: International LP release confirmed cover art for International LP https://www.utadahikaru.jp/news/detail.html?id=527477

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Mar 08, 2021 11:51 am iTunes!! It's March 9th in Japan! Release the album PLEASE!

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Mon Mar 08, 2021 12:16 pm I'm not a big fan of pop songs myself, but this was pretty good, I must say. The cinematography was pretty interesting and its handheld nature and interesting shots reminded me I still need to watch Anno's first two live-action films at some time.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Mar 08, 2021 12:49 pm Also is it too much to hope for a remix EP with a pic of Mari in a similar style?

[]: Re: One Last Kiss - Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Mon Mar 08, 2021 3:41 pm Nice song. The EP of One Last Kiss is on european Spotify already but without One Last Kiss nor Beautiful World (Da Capo Version).

Article: One Last Kiss Hideaki Anno Produced Music Video
: ■今ミュージックビデオに関して 今ミュージックビデオは、『シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版』総監督の庵野秀明が監督を務めました。 宇多田ヒカルサイドからのミュージックビデオ製作オファーを快諾した庵野氏は 「現状可能なMVの作り方として現場ディレクション無しで本人の自撮り等による撮影素材を送ってもらって、それを切り取り繋げて作品に仕上げる」という方法を提案。庵野氏からカメラ目線やリップシンク等メールによる最小限の注文を受け、宇多田ヒカルは細心のコロナ感染対策を取りながら数名のスタッフとともにロンドン郊外で撮影を敢行。 スマートフォンも含む様々な機材で撮られた映像素材を受け取った庵野監督らが日本で編集を行いました。まるでプライベートな過去の大切な記憶を辿るような、切ない感情が湧き上がる作品が完成しましたので、是非お楽しみください。
